prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, develop variants of JAK1 (Kinase) from Homo sapiens with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. outline a computational methodology covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using RoseTTAFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: JAK1; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
